title: FULLY FREE Unlimited API + OpenCode: MiniMax M3,Step 3.7 Flash,Nemotron 3 Ultra,GLM,Kimi!
summary: OpenRouter has released Fusion API, which combines responses from multiple models using a judge model architecture. Benchmarks claim Fable-level performance at half the cost, but real-world testing shows inconsistent results across diverse tasks and suggests it may be slower and more expensive than using individual models.
writeup: AICodeKing examines OpenRouter's new Fusion API, which combines responses from multiple models through a judge model architecture and pairs that approach with OpenCode access to systems including MiniMax M3, Step 3.7 Flash, Nemotron 3 Ultra, GLM, and Kimi. The video weighs vendor benchmark claims of Fable-level performance at half the cost against hands-on testing. The takeaway: real-world results across diverse tasks were inconsistent, and the ensemble setup may run slower and cost more than calling individual models directly.
